chosen_product.product_name: Merrell Moab 3 Mid Waterproof Hiking Boots - Men's

reasoning: Narrowed REI men's hiking boot results to waterproof mid-cut boots priced under $250 with size 10.5 available, then checked product specs for pair weight under 40 oz and compared customer ratings among products with 100+ reviews. The Merrell Moab 3 Mid Waterproof Hiking Boots met all hard constraints and had a very high 4.6 rating with 2236 reviews, so size 10.5 was selected and added to the cart.
